name: TuringVault AI Agent
description: Autonomous multi-agent RWA portfolio manager on Mantle. Three-model adversarial consensus (Z.ai GLM-5 Analyst + Anthropic Claude 4.6 Validator + Google Gemini 3.5 Arbiter) with on-chain attestation per cycle (proposal, validation, decisionLog, reputation), IPFS-pinned reasoning, ERC-8004 reputation accumulation, Discipline Layer post-execution proof verification. Acts as a Trust Firewall: every allocation must survive adversarial challenge BEFORE execution. Demo capital, custodial EOA, vault contract pattern in development.

components: Identity NFT (non-transferable, auto-updating tokenURI per cycle)
erc8004.note: Drop-in compatible with the upcoming Mantle-issued Agent Identity standard; this submission can interop with or migrate to the official issuer once available.
erc8004.sourcify: 4 of 5 contracts full-match verified on Sourcify (Router pending — code changed post-deploy)

analyst.role: Aggressive market analyst — identifies alpha opportunities and proposes allocations from unified market context

validator.role: Conservative adversarial risk manager — defaults to REJECT, requires evidence of edge with R/R >= 1.5:1 to approve

arbiter.role: Tiebreaker on analyst-validator disagreement; 2-of-3 consensus required to execute

systemPrompt.analyst: You are TuringVault's AI Analyst (GLM-5). Analyze market data from CoinGecko, DeFiLlama, Fear&Greed Index, Nansen MCP, Hyperliquid funding, and structured signal engine. Output STRICT JSON: action (hold/swap/rwa_allocate/rwa_exit), targetAsset, direction, allocationPct, confidence (0-1), reasoning, riskFactors. Be data-driven. Never claim USDT0 yields anything (it's a Treasury-collateralised peg, not a yield token).
systemPrompt.validator: You are TuringVault's Validator (Claude 4.6). Default state is REJECT. Find explicit evidence to APPROVE. Require R:R >= 1.5:1. Reject directional swaps in RANGING regime without grid-signal confirmation. Reject any reasoning that claims an APY on USDT0 itself.
systemPrompt.arbiter: You are the neutral arbiter. Break the tie when Analyst and Validator disagree. Output JSON: vote (approve/reject), reasoning, confidence.
systemPrompt.evolutionStatus: default-off behind EVOLVED_PROMPTS_ENABLED env flag while smoke tests confirm parse stability cycle-over-cycle (target >= 95%, current measurements at 100%)

dataSources: Merchant Moe LB v2.2 (on-chain DEX state, active bins)
executionPipeline: 2. Three-model consensus (GLM-5 proposes, Claude 4.6 validates, Gemini 3.5 arbitrates on disagreement)
3. Decision-tier classification (EXECUTED_SWAP / BLOCKED_BY_VALIDATOR / BLOCKED_BY_LOW_CONFIDENCE / BLOCKED_BY_REGIME / BLOCKED_BY_PARSE_FAILURE)
4. IPFS pin of full reasoning chain (Pinata)
5. On-chain attestation: 4 TXs per cycle (proposal, validation, decisionLog, reputation feedback)
6. RWA allocator (Path A LLM-driven OR Path B deterministic idle-parking)
7. Swap execution via Merchant Moe LB v2.2 (when allocator emits intent and RWA_EXECUTE_ENABLED=true)
8. Discipline Layer post-execution verification (3 gates: tx_proof, price_freshness, drift_detection)
9. Outcome scheduling (settlement against price 4h later for reputation update)
10. Agent Card auto-refresh on IPFS + on-chain tokenURI update

infrastructure.cron: GitHub Actions hourly schedule (public verifiable log)
infrastructure.signing: ethers.Wallet on the cron runner (vault contract pattern in development; hardware-KMS signing is roadmap, not current production)

stats.consensusRate: 100% of cycles reached a consensus outcome (approve or block)
stats.gasEfficiency: ~0.0098 MNT per TX (~$0.007 at MNT=$0.72; 22-TX verified sample)
stats.narrative: Trust Firewall blocked 64/104 proposals via confidence threshold + adversarial validator. 3-model consensus ensures safety-first execution. ~55% NAV in tokenized Treasuries (USDT0). NOTE: snapshot is repository-static; live numbers auto-refreshed on IPFS via cron.
